nasb.text: Moreover, he made high places in the mountains of Judah, and caused the inhabitants of Jerusalem to play the harlot and led Judah astray.

esv.text: Moreover, he made high places in the hill country of Judah and led the inhabitants of Jerusalem into whoredom and made Judah go astray.

cnv.text: 他又在猶大眾山上建築邱壇，使耶路撒冷的居民行邪淫，引誘猶大人。

ccb.text: 约兰在犹大的山上修建丘坛，引诱耶路撒冷的居民和犹大人与假神苟合。
